Brand Monitor
July 16, 2026 | Daily Scan

Know where your brand is showing up

A lightweight public-source monitor for founders and small teams. It scans configured sources, dedupes mentions, scores signal, and turns the daily feed into a short action list.

Live sample configuration This report is generated from the checked-in brand and source config. Swap config/brands.json and config/sources.json to monitor your own market.
What

Daily mention scan

Tracks public mentions across configured feeds and search surfaces without requiring a paid enterprise suite.

Why

Less missed signal

Find launches, coverage, competitor comparisons, and high-signal posts before they disappear into the feed.

How

Filter, dedupe, score

Filters loose matches, removes repeat URLs, scores relevance, and publishes a static report for the team.

First check

Review high-signal mentions

No high-signal mentions crossed the highlight threshold in this scan.

Second check

Compare brand mix

Use the brand breakdown to see which configured names are generating attention today.

Third check

Update the config

Add competitors, products, exclusions, or source feeds when the log shows too much noise or misses expected coverage.
